channel.title: Work-Experience on Arjun Gandhi
channel.description: Recent content in Work-Experience on Arjun Gandhi

item.title: Fitzgerald Prototyping Lab
item.description:
The Blurb

This lab is WPI’s 3D printing lab. There, I worked as a lab assistant managing over 40+ 3d printers, a laser cutter, and a PCB machine. I started working there at the start of the labs opening and spent a lot of time tuning all of the printers to get optimal performance.

item.title: Ofs
item.description:
The Blurb

OFS (Optical Fiber Solutions) is a fiber manufacturing company. I’ve held two internships here (one in high school, and one the summer that I wrote this. My biggest project there was suggesting solutions and improvements to a fiber storage robot known as the ASRS.
